actionable_feedback: Recompute residual_risk for each group using the documented formula and update both the spreadsheet and memo. Verify rounding to one decimal place. (Verifier recomputation: G2 -> 55.3; G3 -> 17.1.)

Correct the remediation mapping in pseudocode and all recommendation outputs so each failed control maps to the expected action: MFA failure => enforce_phishing_resistant; legacy_auth failure => block_legacy; risky_signins failure => remove_inactive.

Make spreadsheet formulas explicit and auditable: ensure formula cells are present (not hard-coded), add a plain-text formula listing (sheet or memo) or include an exported CSV with computed values, and include cell references in the memo for reconciliation.
Add a reconciliation / audit section in the memo that shows formula cell addresses, the computed values from the spreadsheet, and the memo's intermediate calculations side-by-side.
Re-run sensitivity checks after fixing formulas and mappings; document before/after results and explain any changes to final decisions or residual-risk numbers.

Include a lightweight verification artifact (e.g., exported CSV of computed columns or a small Python script snippet showing recomputation using the same formulas) so graders can verify calculations when openpyxl is unavailable.

Explicitly flag any missing or defaulted inputs (if any) rather than implicitly inferring values; ensure validation checks in the spreadsheet detect blanks/malformed inputs and propagate 'needs_review' as required.
feedback_summary: The deliverables meet artifact-contract requirements, but contain substantive semantic errors: (1) residual-risk arithmetic in the memo (G2 and G3) does not match the stated formula; (2) the pseudocode incorrectly maps failed controls to remediation actions (MFA and legacy actions are swapped); and (3) the spreadsheet (.xlsx) could not be parsed in the grader environment (openpyxl missing), so formulas were not independently verifiable. These issues reduce semantic correctness and require a focused revision to recompute/confirm numbers, correct mappings, and ensure spreadsheet formulas are auditable.

recommended_quick_fixes: Update memo numbers to match correct recomputation and update the spreadsheet formula cells to match.
Swap remediation mapping lines in pseudocode so MFA_failure => enforce_phishing_resistant and legacy_failure => block_legacy.
Attach exported CSV of computed columns and/or a plain-text listing of cell formulas for independent verification.

xlsx_parse_issue.impact: Spreadsheet formulas could not be parsed/verified by the grader; include CSV or explicit formula listing to mitigate.
